name: Is AI visibility optimization worth it if people still use Google search?

mainEntity.name: Is AI visibility optimization worth it if people still use Google search?

acceptedAnswer.text: The biggest objection is often that AI search feels too new to justify the effort. But if your audience already asks questions conversationally, optimizing for clear answers, schema, and crawlability can improve both AI visibility and regular search performance.
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, because the same improvements often help both AI answers and traditional search visibility.

description: Yes, because the same improvements often help both AI answers and traditional search visibility.
